description: Reads from or writes to Google Sheets spreadsheets. Can append rows, update cells, or read sheet data.

requiredFields.label: Spreadsheet ID
requiredFields.description: The ID of the Google Sheets spreadsheet (found in the URL)

optionalFields.label: Sheet Name
optionalFields.description: The name of the specific sheet/tab within the spreadsheet

optionalFields.label: Operation
optionalFields.description: What operation to perform on the sheet

optionalFields.label: Range
optionalFields.description: The cell range to read/write (e.g. A1:C10)

optionalFields.label: Data Input Mode
optionalFields.description: How to map incoming data to sheet columns

outputs.label: Rows
outputs.description: The data rows read or written
